ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used by the athlete (e.g., Wraps) */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Federation the athlete is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for athlete registration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the competition is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the division (M/F) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the division (e.g., 16-17, 18-) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_in_kg" REAL /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weight class record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weight class record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "best_squat_kg" REAL /* Best squat weight in kilograms */,
  "best_bench_kg" REAL /* Best bench press weight in kilograms */,
  "best_deadlift_kg" REAL /* Best deadlift weight in kilograms */,
  "total_kg" REAL /* Total weight lifted in kilograms */,
  "squat_attempts" TEXT /* JSON array of squat attempts */,
  "bench_press_attempts" TEXT /* JSON array of bench press attempts */,
  "deadlift_attempts" TEXT /* JSON array of deadlift attempts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_competitions" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the equipment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total points scored by the athlete in the competition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ranking record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the administrative user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the administrative user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrative user (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrative user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_user_id")
)
